_doc: The Company's service registry — the single self-describing source of truth for what runs on this machine. The AI reads this to know the whole landscape; the `company` command (ops/company) operates it. Adding a service = adding an entry here. It's OK if some entries are imperfect (ports/units) — better than the scatter it replaces. systemd is the muscle underneath; this is the map + the console.

groups.core: The live interactive Company — the surface + its API (the always-on heart)
groups.models: On-demand models — started per task, VRAM-budgeted, usually dormant
groups.reach: Network + always-on system services (the body's connection to the world)

chat-4b.title: Qwen3.5-4B-AWQ (vLLM) — a local WORKER (not the RHM brain; the RHM main is a cloud model)
chat-4b.note: boot config = serve.sh: gpu-util 0.80, 32K ctx, native tool-calling on, no-think template (the proven hand-start). Canonical unit now in ops/systemd/vllm-chat.service (ExecStart=~/vllm-tests/serve.sh, untracked — can drift; inlining is a model-layer move). NOT restarted to avoid disrupting live sessions; the live reboot-swap test is operator-confirmed. Collective-cognition frame: see Native Model Layer synthesis

stt-whisper.title: Whisper.cpp STT (voice in — the boot-default ear)
stt-whisper.note: the live zero-install on-machine ear; serves the OpenAI-compat route /v1/audio/transcriptions (this build returns 404 for /inference). STT_DEFAULT=whispercpp. Registered in voice/stt.py STT_PROVIDERS.

stt-parakeet.title: NVIDIA Parakeet-TDT 0.6B v3 STT (GPU, NeMo)
stt-parakeet.note: GPU ear — VERIFIED RUNNING 2026-06-05 (load→up ~30s, ~5.1 GB resident, transcribes; unload frees). Own NeMo venv (CUDA-13). Live multilingual workhorse → candidate STT_DEFAULT. See voice/ears/REQUIREMENTS.md.

stt-canary.title: NVIDIA Canary-Qwen 2.5B STT (GPU, NeMo)
stt-canary.note: GPU ear — heaviest (~10 GB resident, near-OOM); on-demand only, never co-resident with a local brain. Own NeMo venv. English-max + understanding. See voice/ears/REQUIREMENTS.md.

stt-granite.title: IBM Granite Speech 4.0 1B STT (GPU, transformers)
stt-granite.note: GPU ear — own transformers venv (COMPANY_GRANITE_DEVICE=cpu dodges the GPU hazard). Compact top-accuracy cross-check. See voice/ears/REQUIREMENTS.md.

tts-chatterbox.title: Chatterbox TTS (clone + intensity)
tts-chatterbox.note: trial engine (persona Viv). Clones COMPANY_VOICE_REF. ~3.4 GB. See voice/engines/REQUIREMENTS.md.

tts-orpheus.title: Orpheus TTS (named voices + cued emotion)
tts-orpheus.note: trial engine (persona Pip). vLLM-backed; ~10 GB + SWAP-HOSTILE (~17min cold) → pin/pre-warm, never cold-on-demand. See voice/engines/REQUIREMENTS.md.

tts-cosyvoice.title: CosyVoice2 TTS (instruct + clone)
tts-cosyvoice.note: trial engine (persona Tess). Needs CUDA_HOME + COMPANY_VOICE_REF. openai-whisper pin conflict may block install (time-boxed). See voice/engines/REQUIREMENTS.md.

tts-xtts.title: XTTS-v2 TTS (clone, realism ceiling)
tts-xtts.note: trial engine (persona Wren). Clones COMPANY_VOICE_REF; NON-COMMERCIAL license. ~2 GB. See voice/engines/REQUIREMENTS.md.

tts-qwen3tts.title: Qwen3-TTS VoiceDesign (describe a voice)
tts-qwen3tts.note: trial engine (persona Sable). VoiceDesign from a text description — NO clip needed (the trial starter). ~4.4 GB, ~25s cold. See voice/engines/REQUIREMENTS.md.
